name: Asian Pear and Lyche Strudel
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Raisins, soaked in plum wine
1 1/2 cups Asian pear, peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
Filling:
1. Soak golden raisins in plum wine overnight.
2. Mix the ingredients to create about four cups of filling.
Assembly:
1. Lay two sheets of phyllo dough on a work surface, one atop the other.
2. Brush melted butter onto the top layer of dough.
3. Spread toasted coconut over the entire pastry.
4. Pour the filling along the long edge of the phyllo dough and roll up tightly, sealing the ends by folding them in.
5. Place the roll on a non-stick baking sheet.
6. Brush melted butter over the top of the roll.
7. Bake at 350°F until golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on a rack.
9. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top before serving.
10. Garnish with slices of kiwi, orange, lemon, and pear for presentation.
